title: Setup Skill: drop the unused async-questions Preflight gate and sweep stale work-tracking prose
description: The Setup Skill's Preflight hard-gates on the async-questions global skill, but nothing in the product invokes it — it would block every external adopter on a dependency nothing uses. Remove it; make-teammate remains the only global-skill gate. Same sweep: the supporting-info work-tracking line still describes the pre-ADR-0005 layout (all-gitignored, flat) and predates ADR-0008's progress/runtime homes — bring it to current truth. End-to-end: a fresh adopter with only make-teammate installed passes Preflight; the skill's own prose matches the stamped layout.
acceptance_criteria: Preflight requires only make-teammate; async-questions appears nowhere in src/
supporting-info describes committed work-tracking with only *_progress.json ignored (ADR-0005) and the .excn/progress/ + .excn/runtime/ homes (ADR-0008)
Ships in the next npm release
root_cause: Preflight list written before the skill body settled; prose never swept after ADR-0005/0008
fix: Preflight gate on async-questions removed (make-teammate is the only global-skill gate); supporting-info work-tracking prose swept to current truth (ADR-0005 *_progress.json-only ignore + ADR-0008 .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/ homes). grep confirms async-questions absent from src/. Commit f8551d8; ships in npm 0.5.0.
notes: Surfaced 2026-06-10 while scoping plugin-marketplace publication: the Preflight dependency story is the real publish blocker.
